description_long: This is a vintage-style round alarm clock with a teal metal body and a white face. The clock face features large black Arabic numerals, black hour and minute hands, and a gold decorative pattern at the center. The top of the clock has a cream-colored section with a button, likely for the alarm function. The back of the clock displays several knobs and switches for setting the time and alarm, as well as a wind-up key and a small metal foot for stability. The clock stands on two small black feet at the front and a single metal peg at the back. The overall design is reminiscent of classic mechanical alarm clocks, with a sturdy and slightly retro appearance.
description: A vintage teal metal alarm clock with a white face, black numerals, and decorative gold detailing, featuring mechanical knobs and a wind-up key on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white clock face with black Arabic numerals, black hands, and gold decorative center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the teal metal casing and cream-colored top button, with minimal visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the mechanical knobs, wind-up key, and adjustment switches, as well as the back support peg.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the teal casing and the protruding back peg, with some knobs partially visible.
attribute_face_design: Round white face with large black Arabic numerals, black hands, and a gold decorative floral pattern at the center.
